last_updated_focus: Renumbered the foundation workflow so 03-design-planner precedes 04-dag-builder, with design as the high-level route frame and DAG/identification as the causal-logic method-selection layer.
notes: Preliminary skill package. The top-level main skill normally speaks with the user, while Domain Helper, Data Inspector, Design Planner, and DAG Builder maintain backend YAML records that guide method routing and conversation.
